approved_decisions: course-based ethics determination with no external participant recruitment
non-destructive full-study execution after all technical freeze checks pass
communication_method: relayed by the project lead in the Codex task
public_record_boundary: Names, signatures, private communications, and contact details remain outside Git.
technical_boundary: Approval does not substitute for dataset materialization, sample-size justification, listener-security evidence, dedicated-workspace verification, telemetry verification, or a valid protocol audit.
